title: Refund Policy
intro: At Melsta Studio, we want every experience to be exceptional. This Refund Policy outlines the conditions under which refunds are issued for bookings made through our platform.

sections.title: Cancellation & Refund Eligibility
sections.description: Whether you are eligible for a refund depends on when you cancel and the circumstances of your booking.

items.title: Cancellation 24+ Hours in Advance
items.description: Bookings cancelled at least 24 hours before the scheduled appointment are eligible for a full refund to the original payment method.

items.title: Cancellation Within 24 Hours
items.description: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment are not eligible for a refund, as the artist has reserved time specifically for your session.

items.title: Artist-Initiated Cancellation
items.description: If your booking is cancelled by the artist or by Melsta Studio, you will receive a full refund regardless of the notice period.

items.title: Service Quality Concerns
items.description: If you believe a completed service did not meet the agreed standard, please contact us within 48 hours of the appointment. We review each case individually and may offer a partial refund or credit at our discretion.

sections.title: Non-Refundable Scenarios
sections.description: The following situations are not eligible for a refund.

items.title: Completed Services
items.description: Once a service has been fully rendered by the artist, it is non-refundable unless a quality dispute is raised within 48 hours.

items.title: No-Shows
items.description: If you do not attend your scheduled appointment without prior cancellation, the booking is non-refundable.

items.title: Late Arrivals
items.description: Arriving significantly late may result in a shortened or cancelled session at the artist's discretion. Refunds will not be issued for time lost due to client lateness.

items.title: Change of Mind
items.description: Refunds are not issued for cancellations made within 24 hours of the appointment due to a change of preference or plans.

sections.title: Refund Process & Timeline
sections.description: Once a refund is approved, here is what to expect.

items.title: Processing Time
items.description: Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days. The time for the funds to appear in your account depends on your bank or payment provider.

items.title: Original Payment Method
items.description: Refunds are credited back to the original payment method used at the time of booking. We are unable to process refunds to a different card or account.

items.title: Confirmation
items.description: You will receive an email confirmation once your refund has been approved and initiated.

sections.title: How to Request a Refund
sections.description: To request a refund, please reach out to our support team with your booking details. We aim to respond to all refund requests within 2 business days.

footer: This Refund Policy is subject to change. Any updates will be reflected on this page with a revised date. For questions, contact us at support@melsta.studio.
